title: Modern Store Graphics Package
brief: I’m refreshing my online shop and need a cohesive set of graphics that instantly tells shoppers they’re in a sleek, modern space. The scope is focused on three key areas: • Store Banner – a hero image that sets the tone the moment visitors land in the store, sized for desktop and mobile. • Product Detail Page (PDP) assets – template-ready image frames, iconography, and typography treatments that make features, specs, and calls-to-action pop without clutter. • Store Decoration – background elements, section dividers, and accent graphics that tie everything together and keep the look consistent across every page. Expect clean lines, bold but balanced color, and plenty of negative space—nothing fussy or ornamental. Source files (PSD or AI) plus optimized JPG/PNG exports for immediate upload are required. Deliver layered files, clearly labeled, so my team can tweak text or swap images later. When submitting, show a quick style preview or link to a similar modern-focused project you’ve done. Once we lock the direction, I’ll supply brand colors, product shots, and copy, and we can agree on milestones for banner first, then PDP, then decoration assets. Looking forward to seeing how you’ll turn a plain storefront into a polished, modern shopping experience.
